name: Crackling Cornbread Muffins
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the cornmeal, all-purpose flour, baking powder, and salt in a large bowl.
2. Add the beaten egg and milk to the dry ingredients. Mix until just combined.
3. Carefully pour the batter into two greased muffin pans, filling each 2/3 full.
4. Place the prepared muffin pans in a preheated oven at 400 degrees Fahrenheit (200 degrees Celsius).
5. Bake for 3 minutes or until the muffin pans are very hot.
6. Reduce the temperature to 350 degrees Fahrenheit and continue baking for 30 minutes, or until the muffins are golden brown.
WARNING: Do not use aggressive culinary slang. Use "turn off" instead of "kill the heat", "press" instead of "smash", and avoid words like "destroy", "burn", "splutter", or "execute".
